mapper.select:
SELECT id ,s_info_code ,s_info_name ,b_info_fullname ,b_info_issuer ,b_issue_amountplan ,b_info_carrydate ,b_info_maturitydate ,rating_bond ,rating_bondissuer ,d_bond_type ,b_info_couponrate ,date_exists FROM sirm_bondinfo
AND s_info_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bondCode}, '%')
AND s_info_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bondShortName}, '%')
AND b_info_issuer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{issuer}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id ,s_info_code ,s_info_name ,b_info_fullname ,b_info_issuer ,s_windcode_nib ,s_windcode_sh ,s_windcode_sz ,b_issue_amountplan ,b_issue_amountact ,b_info_couponrate ,b_info_carrydate ,b_info_maturitydate ,b_info_pledge_ratio ,rating_bond_agency ,rating_bond ,rating_bondissuer ,rating_outlook ,b_agency_grnttype ,guarantor ,b_agency_name ,inner_issuer_rating ,d_bond_type ,inner_guarantor_rating ,date_exists ,b_fund_usage ,b_prompt_reason ,b_analysis FROM sirm_bondinfo WHERE id = #{bondId}

SELECT CASE WHEN p.parent_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(pp.pool_name, '/', p.pool_name) ELSE p.pool_name END AS poolName ,ips.pool_type ,DATE_FORMAT(ips.entry_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ip_investment_pool pp ON pp.id = p.parent_id AND pp.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ips.bond_code = #{bondCode} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_investment_pool child WHERE child.parent_id = p.id AND child.is_deleted = 0 )

SELECT CASE WHEN p.parent_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(pp.pool_name, '/', p.pool_name) ELSE p.pool_name END AS poolName ,ips.pool_type ,DATE_FORMAT(MIN(ips.entry_time), '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate ,COUNT(DISTINCT ips.bond_code) AS bondCount FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN sirm_bondinfo sb ON ips.bond_code = sb.s_info_code INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ip_investment_pool pp ON pp.id = p.parent_id AND pp.is_deleted = 0 WHERE sb.b_info_issuer = ( SELECT b_info_issuer FROM sirm_bondinfo WHERE s_info_code = #{bondCode} LIMIT 1 ) AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_investment_pool child WHERE child.parent_id = p.id AND child.is_deleted = 0 ) GROUP BY p.id ,p.pool_name ,p.parent_id ,pp.pool_name ,ips.pool_type

SELECT al.id ,al.bond_code ,al.bond_short_name ,al.bond_type ,al.adjust_type ,al.adjust_mode ,al.target_pool_id ,al.target_pool_name ,al.pool_type ,al.audit_status ,al.adjuster_id ,al.adjuster_name ,al.adjust_reason ,al.adjust_advice ,al.attachment_files ,al.material_files ,al.submit_time ,al.audit_time ,al.entry_time FROM ip_adjust_log al WHERE al.bond_code = #{bondCode} AND al.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY al.crte_time DESC
